main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor literal 'daño oxidativo irreversible poliamida por cloro libre + CAG agotado'.

key_signals.justification: Conecta cloro libre + ORP +320 + caída rechazo 99.1→96.2 + conductividad triplica + estable ΔP.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts (MECH O-ring, OXID por pH extremo, biofouling) con why_discardable anclado.

recommended_action.justification: Mantener parada hipoclorito + SBS NaHSO3 3 mg/L + probing tubo a tubo — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide Rhodamina B / vacuum test + autopsia — match accepted (test funcional + autopsia FTIR).

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: probing localiza pérdida en pocos vasos → MECH switch.
